title: Garlic Lemon Whole30
description: A savory and aromatic dish featuring lemongrass, garlic, and a touch of sweetness from honey that comes together in one pot for a quick and easy meal.

ingredients.name: 5 stalks lemongrass
ingredients.notes: Use the tender white parts only

instructions: Wash lemongrass stalks thoroughly, remove tough outer layers, then cut them into thirds.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
Add sliced lemongrass to the skillet with garlic. Pour in lemon juice from one lemon.
Gradually add more lemons, including their wedges, along with any remaining fresh leaves from the stalks. Stir well and let simmer for a few minutes to release flavors.
If using honey, mix it into the sauce before serving, or serve alongside as a sweetener option.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately over whole30-friendly grains like cauliflower rice or quinoa.
